transcript.text:
[Today's mouthwatering food item]
[American-style BBQ is here!]
[BBQ mountain]
It's gonna be amazing
[Will shock all the people around the world]
[Stacks on stacks on stacks]
[Let's put it away]
-It's 20,000kcal -This right here?
You can stop now
Hello everyone
I'm here at Itaewon today to have some barbecue
There are a lot of foreign foods at Itaewon
And there's an American-style BBQ here
The place is pretty hyped, so I'm looking forward to it
I have English trauma
I'm worried

Ta-da Here
[Linus BBQ] [Seoul, Yongsan-gu]
[It's already waiting for Tzuyang]
[Let's open it up]
[Wow, the visuals...]
[Ready to meet Tzuyang]
[Finally a worthy opponent...]
Looks really good It's gonna be amazing
I don't think she can do it
That's honestly too much
I don't even think I can eat a single rack myself
Let's start with this one first
Incredible
It's really big
It looks like dinosaur meat
It's twice as big

Bon appetit
Very tender
Because this is an American way,
the sauce tastes different for sure
So juicy
So much more meat than bones
[One more!]
There's a lot of meat This is all meat
I can taste some herb that's very similar to black peppers
[Just Tzuyang and pork ribs...]
So much meat
Barely any bones
Cream sauce here
Is it onions?
[Let's rip it out!]
[Nope...]

[Right, let's use the tools]
It's a big rack of ribs, but it has small bones
[Re-heated pork ribs]
Do you see how moist this is?
Nice and greasy
So good
It's re-heated
Tastes even better warm
The sauce is sweet
I can tell that they put effort in it
Cream sauce
I think it was cooked for 6 hours?
So it's very soft and tender
[That juicy goodness...]
Can you see the juiciness?
It squeezes out

How is it this tender?
Look at this piece of meat
It's all meat
Wow, you're almost finished
[This was nothing]
These are bigger than I thought
I didn't know 1 rack would take this long to eat
You're amazing...
I haven't even started yet
Why's this part so hard to eat? What kind of bone is this?
Next
This really is a lot of food
Tiny bones with lots of meat
I'll cut it up
Cut it in half
And leave this here

Looks like back ribs now
I'll show you the cut piece
This is all meat It's very soft
Now that it's cut up, it's like 3x bigger than regular back ribs
It's not hard either
Look at it
[An accordion]
Rips easily
I'm hooked on milk, so I drink a lot of milk these days
[Pork Ribs and Milk...?]
[Wash it down with some coke]
[Another one]
This one's really soft
I won't need a knife for this
This should be good shredded as well
[Patience is bitter, but the fruit is sweet...]

Should be good as a sandwich too
[You can't go wrong with this]
I don't need vegetables
Dip this in the onion sauce
Meat burger
A real meat burger
It tastes so good like this
It would be excellent with 1 fried egg inside and nothing else
The buns taste great
[Let's do it 1 more time!]
The onion sauce goes really well with this sandwich
It's so juicy with a hint of saltiness
The meat is tender
[Another BBQ sandwich]
Wait, this sauce is the best
[After 3 BBQ sandwiches...]

[Another rack of ribs?!]
4th one!
I've never had this much BBQ before
Is she going to be okay?
[Not worried, she's just at peace]
I keep expressing in English because I keep hearing English
Onion sauce
I don't even know if this is onion
It's so good I want to come back here again
The sandwich is truly the best
A mountain
[With lots of sauce]
[She finds it funny too]
How did they make the buns taste so good? Is it butter?
We calculated the total calories you just consumed...
And it's about 20,000kcal

What I just had?
I'm starting to get worried
You can stop now
It's high in calories because we put the sauce on, dry it, put the sauce on again, dry it again
[He's being very transparent]
Is it okay to share that information?
-Stop eating now -Okay okay
[20,000kcal is pretty concerning]
I'll enjoy the rest at home then
The owner is worried that I had way too much calories in 1 sitting
So I'll end it here
[All for Tzuyang's health~!]
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
